title: 有馬記念の後に・感謝と誓いを共にして

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo fails to finish first. But despite her
great disappointment, she heads to the concert
stage together with Seiun Sky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is the last race of the year, which
makes this is the last opportunity to show her
gratitude to her fans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The winning concert they perform is the most
exciting of the year.
